agent_review.notes:
DELTA-MARKER PROPAGATION NOW FIXED — verified on real output: all 17 clean content chunks are marked IsDelta=true (visible mid-word splits like '...workspace_' + 'advanced server.' and the table split '| Field | Value |
|-------' + '|
| build_id | ... |
|' + ' status | ok |'). processChunks now carries the delta marker onto StreamingChunkEvent.IsDelta, so a mcpagent-layer consumer can concatenate pi's delta run verbatim and reassemble the message without garbling (block providers like claude show delta_content_count=0). Real-bridge path clean end to end: pi's 'mcp' calls went mcpbridge → executor → real execute_shell_command; report.md on disk is a correct markdown table with BUILD_ID_3ff7ad76e877 (only ever in the file) and pi's final reply is a clean GFM table. Only the generic 'mcp' tool label remains.
